calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Maria Lertora, #11935.

Simon R. Goodfellow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff W.W. Wharf GL., Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Sharon Gurewitz, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Nancy Kwok or Angela Luong.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 27, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 19, 2009.
Judgment for Possession Only was issued on April 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff W.W. Wharf GL, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the defaulted defendants Nancy Kwok and Angela Luong as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $21,342.00.
Holdover Damages - $15,552.04.
Attorney Fees - $3,937.50.
Costs - $561.50.
Sheriff's Eviction Fee - $395.00.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 2640 Mason Street, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Amended Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
